notes: Core Tetris works with ghost piece, hold, next preview, and scoring, but lock delay logic is broken (lockTimer only increments by gravityInterval instead of dt, so pieces rarely lock naturally), the overlay div uses textContent with newlines that don't render as line breaks, valid() is declared twice causing a redeclaration, and the DAS initial trigger fires before the delay accumulates properly.
Playable basic Tetris with recognizable visuals, but state/init logic is sloppy, hold/spawn flow is questionable, overlay text handling is poor, and overall polish/game-feel is only mediocre.
